Part.Source:
If &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim &TituloMenu = 'Ult.Compra' EndiF
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor &index = 1
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'RANKING DE VENDAS POR CLIENTES' print Cabecalho If &index = 1 &index = 2 Print Filtros EndIf Print Menu End
&ColGrupCod = RetornaCollGrupoProduto.Udp(&EmpCod,&GrupHie) &TotPedVlrLiq = 0 &TotPedVlrBrt = 0 &sdtRankingClientes.Clear()
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod, LctAtuEst,LctTip, PedCliCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where GrupCod in &ColGrupCod when not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() Where LctTip = 'V' Where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod when not &PedVenCod.IsEmpty() Where PedSts = &PedSts when not &PedSts = 'T' Where PedSts <> 'C' when &PedSts = 'T' Where (PedDtaEms >= &PedDtaFat And PedDtaEms <= &PedDtaFat_to) When &PedSts <> 'F' Where (PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaFat And PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaFat_to) When &PedSts = 'F' Where LctCod = &Lctcod When not &Lctcod.IsEmpty() Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin when not &LctGerFin.IsEmpty() Where PedCliSts = &PesSts when not &PesSts.IsEmpty() Where PedCliRatCod = &RatCod when not &RatCod.IsEmpty() Where PedVlrBrt <> 0
&IsAchou = False For &sdtRankingClientesItem in &sdtRankingClientes If &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliCod = PedCliCod &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc &IsAchou = True Exit EndIF EndFor
If &IsAchou = False &sdtRankingClientesItem = new() &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliCod = PedCliCod &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz = PedCliCodRaz &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliUfCidade = PedCliCidUfeCod +' - ' +PedCliCidNom &sdtRankingClientesItem.PesUltVenDta = PedCliUltVenDta &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt = PedVlrItm &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq = PedVlrItmComDsc &sdtRankingClientes.Add(&sdtRankingClientesItem) EndIf
&TotPedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc &TotPedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm
EndFor &auxPedVlrBrt = 0 &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &PedCliCodRaz = '' &auxPedCliCodRaz = '' &percentual = 0
Do Case Case &Order = 1 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('[PedVlrBrt]') Case &Order = 2 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('PesUltVenDta') Case &Order = 3 &sdtRankingClientes.Sort('[PesUltVenDta]') EndCase
If &UltimaCompra = Status_SimNao.Sim
For &sdtRankingClientesItem in &sdtRankingClientes &Posicao += 1 &PedCliCodRaz = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz &auxPedCliCodRaz = substr(&sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz,1,50)+'...' &auxPedVlrBrt = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq &PedCliCidNom = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliUfCidade &percentual = (( &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc /&TotPedVlrLiq) * 100) &VarItem = trim(dtoC(&sdtRankingClientesItem.PesUltVenDta)) If &UfCidade = Status_SimNao.Nao print Itens Else Print Itens2 EndIf
EndFor Else For &sdtRankingClientesItem in &sdtRankingClientes &Posicao += 1 &PedCliCodRaz = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz &auxPedCliCodRaz = substr(&sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliRaz,1,50)+'...' &auxPedVlrBrt = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrBrt &PedCliCidNom = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedCliUfCidade &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc = &sdtRankingClientesItem.PedVlrLiq &percentual = (( &AuxPedVlrItmComDsc /&TotPedVlrLiq) * 100)
If &UfCidade = Status_SimNao.Nao print Itens Else Print Itens2 EndIf EndFor EndIF
Print Total
Footer print Rodape End

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!
